summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DayMinder MVP - minimalist habit tracking planner. Tested backend APIs, frontend UI, authentication flow, habit management, calendar functionality, and golden day features. All core functionality working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns status 200 instead of expected 201 for successful creation
minor_bugs.impact: Cosmetic - endpoint works correctly but returns wrong HTTP status code

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct minimalist design (navy/gold/paper colors, Playfair Display + Manrope fonts)
Google OAuth login redirects correctly to auth.emergentagent.com
Dashboard authentication and session management working
Tutorial modal appears for new users and creates default habits
Calendar grid displays correctly with 7-column layout
Day modal opens when clicking calendar days
Golden day highlighting works (victory-gold background for 100% completed days)
Habit management page - create, delete, color selection works
Admin dashboard shows correct stats and user table
All backend API endpoints functional (10/11 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor backend issue: POST /api/habits should return status 201 instead of 200 for successful habit creation

success_percentage.backend: 91% (10/11 tests passed - minor status code issue)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (auth flow, habit tracking, calendar functionality all working)
